asymptotic_transport_equivalence_certifi.equivalence_statement: Admissible transport choices differ only by the derived boundary recharting/gauge action, so they define one OPH-stable local *-isomorphism class on the quotient test system.

notes: This artifact is constructive but not yet the realized scaling-limit cap pair.
It packages the prelimit transported cap-local system at the quotient/local *-isomorphism level only.
The only remaining emitted witness for cap-pair promotion is the vanishing carried-collar schedule on fixed local collar models.

compatibility: isotony of the directed local family
channel composition along the realized refinement chain
projectively_compatible_transported_cap_.construction: For n ≥ m, define ω_{n→m}^{(χ)}(X) = ω_{ℓ_n}(τ_{n→m}^{(χ)}(X)), where τ_{n→m}^{(χ)} is refinement inclusion plus admissible recharting into the fixed reference chart.

reference_cap_local_test_system.construction: Fix one reference cut presentation/chart along the cap boundary and use rational matrix-coefficient cap-local subalgebras on supported local regions s ⊂ C as the directed test family T_{m,s} ⊂ A_m(s).

remaining_missing_witness_contract.for_fixed_models: every fixed local collar model (m, delta)
remaining_missing_witness_contract.meaning: Carried-collar remainder schedules vanish along the realized refinement chain after transport to one fixed collar model.

role: Package the quotient/local *-isomorphism-level transported cap-local system that the scaling-limit cap-pair extraction theorem uses as input.

components: exists lambda_bar_{m,delta} > 0 with lambda_{*,n,m,delta} >= lambda_bar_{m,delta} eventually
smaller_remaining_raw_datum.role: raw fixed-local-collar datum that implies the eta schedule once emitted
